overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Origins showing a hooded warrior walking through an ornate ancient palace colonnade, exiting to a sunlit garden path lined with palm trees, and descending stairs into a bustling harbor with the Lighthouse of Alexandria visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: ornate palace colonnade with mosaic flooring

events.description: character exits the covered colonnade through a large doorway into the outdoor garden

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the grand corridor, passing decorative columns and lattice screens

notable_agents.action: robed civilian walking past the character in the opposite direction

entered.detail: tall decorated stone pillars with carved capitals lining the corridor
wooden carved screen with geometric patterns covering the wall
intricate geometric tile pattern in blue and white
long red rug running down the center of the walkway

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a grand interior colonnade with ornate stone columns and decorative wooden screens. The space is sheltered with mixed lighting, featuring intricate mosaic floors partially covered by a red carpet runner. A robed civilian passes by in the opposite direction as the character approaches the exit doorway.

scene_state.functional_zone: palace garden walkway with palm trees and flowering bushes

agents.ego_description: walking along the exterior path beside the palace wall, passing palm trees and manicured gardens

entered.detail: exterior wall of the palace with tall windows and decorative stonework
tall palm trees lining the garden path
lush bushes with red and yellow flowers
stone statues set into niches on the building wall

segments.scene_description: Exiting the palace, the character walks along a sunlit garden path with the grand building facade on the left and lush vegetation including palm trees and flowering bushes on the right. The mosaic pavement continues outdoors, and classical statues adorn the palace walls.

scene_state.functional_zone: ancient harbor overlook with lighthouse view

events.description: character reaches the top of stone stairs overlooking the harbor and lighthouse
character begins descending the wide stone staircase toward the harbor

agents.ego_description: descending the stairs into the harbor area, observing the ships and lighthouse in the distance

notable_agents.action: child running across the harbor square near the stairs

entered.detail: tall white lighthouse (Pharos of Alexandria) towering over the harbor
ancient sailing vessels with furled sails docked in the harbor
wide stone steps leading down to the harbor level
large stone sculptures including a winged figure and sphinx
wooden stalls with fabric canopies selling goods

segments.scene_description: The character emerges onto a harbor overlook with the iconic Lighthouse of Alexandria visible in the distance. Descending wide stone stairs, the scene reveals bustling market stalls, ancient sailing ships, and monumental statues. The palm trees continue to line the path as the character enters the lively harbor area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the sheltered luxury of a palace interior out into the expansive, sun-drenched bustle of an ancient harbor. It begins within a grand colonnade of ornate stone columns and decorative wooden screens, gliding over mosaic floors and a red carpet runner as a robed civilian passes by. As the character reaches the exit, the scene opens into a bright garden path where the palace facade gives way to lush palm trees, flowering bushes, and classical statues. The camera then follows the descent down wide stone stairs from a harbor overlook, shifting the perspective to reveal the iconic Lighthouse of Alexandria in the distance. Finally, the environment expands into a lively waterfront filled with market stalls, monumental statues, and ancient sailing ships.
